status_quo: An 18% overstatement in sell-through means we're making buying decisions based on phantom demand — translating to $500K+ in excess inventory risk per season.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ's audit surfaced 2 findings and enabled targeted remediation that improved the reliability score from 30 to 85.
headline_finding: 128 near-duplicate rows detected (identical on all fields except key columns). This suggests duplicate ingestion or recording.
